_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Using PCB-Gal4 to drive green fluorescent protein (mCD8::GFP), we fixed and immunostained nervous systems, and found sparse but robust GFP expression in neurons in both the brain and VNS
details: Used for image analysis and quantification of fluorescent protein expression patterns
